rules.rule_text:
title: Equation Group C2 Communication
id: 881834a4-6659-4773-821e-1c151789d873
status: test
description: Detects communication to C2 servers mentioned in the operational notes
  of the ShadowBroker leak of EquationGroup C2 tools
references:
- https://steemit.com/shadowbrokers/@theshadowbrokers/lost-in-translation
- https://medium.com/@msuiche/the-nsa-compromised-swift-network-50ec3000b195
author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
date: 2017-04-15
modified: 2021-11-27
tags:
- attack.exfiltration
- attack.command-and-control
- attack.g0020
- attack.t1041
- detection.emerging-threats
logsource:
  category: firewall
detection:
  selection:
  - dst_ip:
    - 69.42.98.86
    - 89.185.234.145
  - src_ip:
    - 69.42.98.86
    - 89.185.234.145
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: high
